name: In the Spirit Seafood Strata
recipeIngredient: 8 oz thawed frozen crabmeat, cut into 1/2-inch slices (Surimi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle 2 1/2 cups of the oyster crackers over the bottom of a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inches baking dish.
2. Layer onions, water chestnuts, peas, and crabmeat (or Surimi) on top of the crackers.
3. Top with remaining crackers.
4. Blend together the remaining ingredients (lobster bisque, soup mix, green onions, lemon pepper seasoning, and peas) in a bowl.
5. Pour the blended mixture over the layers in the baking dish.
6. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
7. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Cut into squares to serve.
10. Garnish with tomatoes and green onion tops, if desired.
11. Makes 8 servings.
